chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 206 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.113/2026. 2. For orders on office objection No.26. 3. For orders on CMA No.2562/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA No.2563/2025. 22.01.2026 Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, advocate holding for the applicant. Learned counsel under instructions does not press this reference application, which is hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
